metadata.title: Posty — AI Social Media Scheduler
metadata.description: Schedule your social posts with AI-powered content creation

auth.subtitle: Schedule smarter with AI
auth.signupSuccess: Account created! Check your email to confirm.
auth.configError: Supabase is not configured. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env.local, then restart the dev server.
auth.networkError: Could not reach Supabase. Check your credentials and internet connection.
auth.signupLegalPrefix: By creating an account, you agree to our

platformStatus.legendBody: Green = publish or schedule from chat now. Amber = connect works, but public posting needs platform App Review. Gray = coming soon in Posty.
platformStatus.summaryFooter: We update these labels as platforms go live. Details in our

hints.instagram: Connect and post photos now. Say “post now on Instagram” in chat.
hints.threads: Connect and post photos, videos, or text on Threads from chat.
hints.linkedin: Connect and publish photos or videos to your LinkedIn profile.
hints.youtube: Connect and upload videos from chat. Processing may take a minute.
hints.tiktok: Connect OAuth and post photos or videos from chat. Public posts need TikTok App Review. Stories are not supported via API.
hints.facebook: Connect your Page now. Photo posting needs Meta App Review before it works for everyone.
hints.pinterest: Connect now. Pin publishing needs Pinterest API approval (re-apply when Posty launches).
hints.x: X (Twitter) OAuth and publishing are not wired yet.
hints.bluesky: Bluesky support is planned — not available yet.

onboarding.step1Subtitle: How should we call you? Claude will use this in chat.
onboarding.nameRequired: Please enter your name to continue.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Link at least one platform to post and schedule from chat.
onboarding.connectedCount: {count, plural, one {# account connected} other {# accounts connected}}
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Open the dashboard chat and try one of these:
onboarding.examplePostNow: Attach a photo, add a caption, then write: “post now on Instagram”
onboarding.exampleSchedule: Or schedule: “schedule for tomorrow at 6pm on YouTube”
onboarding.exampleAttach: Use 📎 to attach photos or videos before you publish.
onboarding.accountsBanner: You're setting up Posty. Connect a platform below, then continue setup.

legal.contactBody: Questions about Posty, privacy, or your data:

dashboard.chatPlaceholder: Ask Claude to create or schedule a post...
dashboard.chatWelcome: Hi! I'm Claude. Tell me what you'd like to post and I'll help you schedule it.
dashboard.uploadFailed: Could not upload the file. Try again.
dashboard.uploadUnsupported: Unsupported file type. Use JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, MP4, or MOV.
dashboard.uploadTooLarge: File is too large (max 10MB photo, 50MB video).
dashboard.chatError: Could not reach Claude. Please try again.
dashboard.chatSessionExpired: Your session expired. Reload the page and sign in again.
dashboard.chatNotConfigured: Demo mode — add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on Vercel for full AI replies.
dashboard.scheduleFailed: Could not save the scheduled post. Try again.
dashboard.scheduleMissingFields: Missing platform, caption, or date/time for scheduling.
dashboard.scheduleInPast: Pick a date and time in the future.
dashboard.publishFailed: Could not publish to any platform. Check the reply for details.
dashboard.publishPartial: Published to some platforms — see Claude's reply for details.
dashboard.statsConnectHint: Connect an account from Accounts to see live stats.
dashboard.statsUnavailable: Stats unavailable — reconnect the account from Accounts (API permissions may be missing).
dashboard.voiceTapToStop: tap the mic again to send
dashboard.voiceNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser
dashboard.voicePermissionDenied: Allow microphone access in your browser to use voice input.
dashboard.voiceNoSpeech: I didn't catch that. Try again.
dashboard.voiceNetworkError: Voice recognition failed due to a network error.
dashboard.voiceTranscribeFailed: Could not transcribe audio. Use Chrome or add OPENAI_API_KEY on Vercel.
dashboard.voiceError: Voice input failed. Please try again.
dashboard.chatReplyPost: I can help you craft that post! Which platform should we target, and what's the main message?
dashboard.chatReplySchedule: I'll set that up for you. What date and time works best?
dashboard.chatReplyStats: Your best performing platform this week is TikTok with 45.2k views. Want a detailed breakdown?
dashboard.chatReplyDefault: Got it! Tell me more about the content you'd like to create or schedule.
dashboard.profileSubtitle: Manage your profile and account settings.
dashboard.accountsSubtitle: Link your social media accounts to schedule and publish posts.
dashboard.tiktokVideoHint: For video: enable Content Posting API + video.publish in TikTok Developer. Public posts for all users require TikTok App Review (Production) — Sandbox is for internal testing only.
dashboard.instagramInvalidState: Instagram authorization failed. Please try again.
dashboard.instagramNoBusinessAccount: No Instagram Business account found. Link one to a Facebook Page first.
dashboard.instagramNotConfigured: Instagram OAuth is not configured on the server.
dashboard.instagramSaveFailed: Could not save Instagram account. Run the Supabase migration first.

dashboard.youtubeNoChannel: No YouTube channel found for this Google account.

dashboard.youtubeSaveFailed: Could not save YouTube account. Run the Supabase migration first.
dashboard.instagramSavePermission: Could not save Instagram account. Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel and run the GRANT SQL in Supabase.
dashboard.youtubeSavePermission: Could not save YouTube account. Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel and run the GRANT SQL in Supabase.
dashboard.instagramSaveUnknown: Could not save Instagram account. Check Vercel logs or open /api/setup/connected-accounts while logged in.
dashboard.instagramServiceRoleMissing: Add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY to Vercel environment variables, then redeploy.
dashboard.youtubeSaveUnknown: Could not save YouTube account. Check Vercel logs or open /api/setup/connected-accounts while logged in.

profile.hashtagPlaceholder: Type a hashtag and press Enter
profile.claudeNotePlaceholder: Anything else Claude should know about your brand...
